concerns: Interface inconsistency: ContentModule.render(site, rng) takes an external RNG in the interface (step 1), but step 3 says each renderer creates its own RNG via deriveSeed internally. Existing renderers (renderHeader, renderHero, renderFooter) take only GeneratedSite. Match the convention: render(site: GeneratedSite): HTMLElement.

Over-scope: AC requires at least 2 modules; plan builds 6. Consider shipping 3-4 initially (features-grid, news-block, plus 1-2 archetype-specific) and deferring the rest to keep within medium complexity.

Reuse localizeLabel(): render-header.ts already has a localizeLabel() helper for German vocabulary overrides. Extract it to a shared util rather than reimplementing override logic in each module renderer (step 8).

Verify rng.int() bounds: The plan assumes rng.int(2, 4) is inclusive on both ends. Check the actual SeededRandom.int() implementation in seed.ts — if upper bound is exclusive, this picks 2-3 modules, not 2-4.

Era compatibility mappings undefined: The plan declares compatibleEraIds per module but never specifies the actual mappings. Define these upfront to prevent the fewer-than-2-compatible-modules edge case the risks section identifies.
